name: Outrigger Extension
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超接地展開</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アウトリガー・エクスパンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target Machine Xyz Monsters you control with card effects. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Infinitrack" Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 Machine monster that is 2 Ranks higher than that target, by using that target as material, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except EARTH Machine monsters (even if this card leaves the field). (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.)
eff: Your opponent cannot target Machine Xyz Monsters you control with card effects. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Infinitrack" Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 Machine monster that is 2 Ranks higher than that target, by using that target as material, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except EARTH Machine monsters (even if this card leaves the field). (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.)

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
